full_text:
Guo Yuan 郭援
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Yuan (郭援)was born in Yingchuan. Yuan Shang general. Zhong Yao’s sister’s son. Slain by Pang De at Pingyang. Guo Yuan was affiliated with Yuan Shang. Guo Yuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
